Party Rental Packages

Bundle and save with a Nova Kingdom Rentals party package. Packages combine inflatables, lawn games, and extras for birthdays, schools, and community events. Packages from $370. All packages include setup and takedown.

Cascade Starter

Price
$379
Savings
$50
Duration
Private parties: up to 6 hrs · Events: up to 4 hrs

A splash-ready starter bundle for Bridgewater and South Shore birthdays that pairs Crown Cascade water-slide fun with a hand-picked set of lawn games.

  • Crown Cascade
  • 5 Lawn Games
